slide1.title: Good food goes to waste
slide1.subtitle: Every day, restaurants throw away perfectly good food. It doesn't have to be this way.

slide2.title: Share it with your community
slide2.subtitle: Buy surplus food from your favorite restaurants at a reduced price. Win for you, win for them.

slide3.title: Donate and make an impact
slide3.subtitle: Support verified local charities. Your contribution feeds someone in need — with full trust.
